\tzpentry{ID3297}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3297 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} I_{4D} = \left( \frac{R}{ \lambda} \right)^4 \text{ vs. } I_{3D} = \left( \frac{R}{ \lambda} \right)^3 \end{equation}
